title: citrus grandis var. tengu
intro: Citrus grandis var. tengu, also known as the Tengu orange, is a unique and lesser-known variety of citrus plant that is native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the high content of flavonoids and limonoids. The health benefits of Citrus grandis var. tengu include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, Citrus grandis var. tengu is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
